info.title: Strava API
info.description: Canonical OpenAPI generated from API code and augmented with Bruno request coverage.

200.description: The login response containing the username

delete.summary: Submit an account delete job for the current user.

204.description: CORS preflight response or account delete job queued

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent activity statuses to return. Defaults to 10, max 100.

parameters.name: adminLevel
parameters.description: OSM admin_level (e.g. 2 = country, 4 = state/region). See https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:admin_level

parameters.name: forceRefresh
parameters.description: When true, wipes the tile cache and re-fetches from Overpass. Requires x-admin-key header.

200.description: A GeoJson FeatureCollection with administrative boundaries for the given OSM admin_level.

get.summary: List Garmin courses from the configured Garmin proxy service.

post.summary: Upload a Garmin course GPX via the configured Garmin proxy service.

get.summary: Get a Garmin course from the configured Garmin proxy service.

delete.summary: Delete a Garmin course via the configured Garmin proxy service.

put.summary: Replace a Garmin course's route with new GPX via the configured Garmin proxy service.

get.summary: Download a Garmin course GPX from the configured Garmin proxy service.

post.summary: Send device messages to a Garmin device via the configured Garmin proxy service.

400.description: Body missing or not a JSON array

200.description: IDs of admin boundary documents where properties are corrupted (name is an object instead of a string).

parameters.name: adminLevel
parameters.description: OSM admin_level to wipe empty markers for (e.g. 2 or 4). When omitted, all admin levels are wiped.

200.description: Number of admin boundary documents queued for re-enrichment.
All stored admin_level=2 country documents plus a list of ISO codes not yet stored.

parameters.name: countryCodes
parameters.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to fetch. When omitted, all missing countries are fetched.

parameters.name: osmIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated OSM IDs (e.g. relation:2145268) to force-refetch.

get.summary: Get organizer redirect candidates based on similar ids and source URL mismatches.

parameters.name: testRedirects
parameters.description: Visit similar organizer URLs and report confirmed redirects.

parameters.name: autoCreateRedirects
parameters.description: Automatically create redirects for confirmed cases whose target organizer already exists.

post.summary: Redirect one organizer site to another organizer id.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Feature kind to wipe: peak | path | protectedArea | adminBoundary | race

parameters.name: zoom
parameters.description: Optional tile zoom level to filter documents by.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated document IDs to wipe. When omitted, all documents of the given kind are wiped.

200.description: Number of documents marked for expiry (ttl=1).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Feature kind to move: peak | path | protectedArea | adminBoundary | race

parameters.name: fromZoom
parameters.description: Source zoom level for documents to move.

parameters.name: toZoom
parameters.description: Destination zoom level for documents to move.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated feature IDs to move. IDs may be provided with or without the kind prefix.

parameters.name: jobType
parameters.description: Job type: summits | visitedPaths | visitedAreas

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Optional target user id. When omitted, queues jobs for the authenticated session user.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 start date filter (inclusive)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 end date filter (inclusive)

parameters.name: jobType
parameters.description: Job type: summits | visitedPaths | visitedAreas

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Optional target user id. When omitted, queues jobs for the authenticated session user.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 start date filter (inclusive)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Optional ISO 8601 end date filter (inclusive)

post.summary: Submit one or more GPX files for a race URL.
Queue a manual Mistral scrape job for a race event URL.

204.description: All data belonging to user has been removed

200.description: A GeoJson FeatureCollection with peaks. If there is a valid session cookie, the peaks are populated with the summited property.
A GeoJson FeatureCollection with nature reserves and national parks.
A GeoJson FeatureCollection with trail running race routes.

get.summary: List the authenticated user's Strava routes.

200.description: A list of the user's Strava routes.

get.summary: Export a Strava route as a GPX file.

200.description: The route as a GPX file.
A GeoJson FeatureCollection with peaks the user has summited.

parameters.name: forceRefresh
parameters.description: When true, wipes the highway shard cache for the tile and re-fetches from Overpass. Requires x-admin-key header.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's profile and Strava sync status.

200.description: The authenticated user's synced Trailscope files and settings.

parameters.name: areaType
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated filter by area type (e.g. national_park,nature_reserve,protected_area,region,country).

200.description: A list of areas the authenticated user has visited, including visit counts and dates.
A list of paths the authenticated user has been on.
